policy.arenaDates: official overrides when known; otherwise estimated as paper release minus 3 days (labeled)
policy.futureSets: roadmap-announced sets from curated, source-linked entries (future-sets.json); dropped automatically once Scryfall catalogs the set
policy.freshSpoilers: unconfirmed cards from MythicSpoiler shown ahead of Scryfall; dropped automatically once Scryfall catalogs the card (normalized-name match)

sets.name: The Hobbit
sets.notes: Arena typically a few days before paper; confirm when WotC posts official schedule

cards.name: Eagle of the Great Shelf
cards.oracleText:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, it gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each other creature you control.

cards.name: The Eagles Are Coming!
cards.oracleText:
Kicker {2}{W}{W} (You may pay an additional {2}{W}{W} as you cast this spell.)
Choose target creature you own. If this spell was kicked, instead choose any number of target creatures you own. Return each chosen creature to your hand. At the beginning of the next upkeep, create a 4/4 white Bird Soldier creature token with flying for each creature returned to your hand this way.

cards.name: Iron Hills Blacksmith
cards.oracleText:
Double strike
When this creature enters, create a colorless Equipment artifact token named Axe with "Equipped creature gets +1/+0" and equip {2}.

cards.name: The Mountain-king's Return
cards.oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Recruit. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.)
II — Return target creature card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.
III — Put a +1/+1 counter on up to one target creature.

cards.name: The Queen of Dale
cards.oracleText: Whenever an opponent casts their first noncreature spell each turn, you recruit. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.)

cards.name: Roads Go Ever, Ever On
cards.oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.)
I — Search your library for up to two basic Plains cards, exile them, then shuffle. You gain 2 life.
II, III — Put a card exiled with this Saga into its owner's hand.
IV — Whenever you attack this turn, target creature you control gets +1/+1 until end of turn for each Plains you control.

cards.name: Stone by Sunlight
cards.oracleText:
Choose one —
• Destroy target creature with power 4 or greater.
• Until end of turn, target creature becomes an artifact in addition to its other types and gains indestructible. (Damage and effects that say "destroy" don't destroy it.)

cards.name: An Unexpected Party // At the Door
cards.oracleText:
As this enchantment enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +2/+2.

cards.name: Bilbo, Luckwearer // Burglar's Plot
cards.typeLine: Legendary Creature — Halfling Rogue // Sorcery — Adventure
cards.oracleText:
Bilbo can't be blocked.
Whenever Bilbo deals combat damage to a player, draw a card, then discard a card.

cards.name: Bilbo, Thief in the Night
cards.oracleText:
Spells you cast from anywhere other than your hand cost {1} less to cast.
Whenever Bilbo attacks, you may cast an artifact, instant, or sorcery spell from your graveyard. If an instant or sorcery spell cast this way would be put into your graveyard, exile it instead.

cards.name: Elrond, Moon-Reader
cards.oracleText:
Whenever you activate an ability of a creature, draw a card. This ability triggers only once each turn.
{5}{U}{U}: Exile up to two other target nonland permanents you control. Return those cards to the battlefield under their owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

cards.name: Elven Raft-Steerer
cards.oracleText:
Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, choose one —
• Tap target creature an opponent controls.
• Untap target creature you control.

cards.name: "Clown Boat"
cards.oracleText:
Whenever you attack, you recruit. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.)
Crew 2

cards.name: The Lord of the Eagles
cards.oracleText:
Flash
This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is the total power of creatures you control with flying.
Flying

cards.name: Master's Councillors
cards.oracleText:
Vigilance
This creature gets +2/+0 for each graveyard with seven or more cards in it.
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, target player mills three cards. (They put the top three cards of their library into their graveyard.)

cards.name: Ravenhill Flock
cards.oracleText:
Flying
Whenever you draw a card, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature.

cards.name: Riddles in the Dark
cards.oracleText: Look at the top four cards of your library and separate them into a face-down pile and a face-up pile. An opponent chooses one of the piles. Put that pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

cards.name: Sound the Trumpets
cards.oracleText: Counter target spell. If that spell's mana value was 2 or less, recruit. (Draw a card, then discard a card. If you discarded a nonland card, create a 1/1 white Human Soldier creature token.)

cards.name: Thranduil's Decree
cards.oracleText: Counter target spell. If a permanent spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost for as long as it remains exiled.

cards.name: Azog, Moria's Ruin
cards.oracleText: When Azog enters, destroy up to one other target creature. Its controller amasses Goblins X, where X is that creature's power. If you controlled that creature, draw a card. (To amass Goblins X, that player puts X +1/+1 counters on an Army they control. It's also a Goblin. If they don't control an Army, they create a 0/0 black Goblin Army creature token first.)

cards.name: Down, Down to Goblin-town
cards.oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.)
I — Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card.
II — Amass Goblins 1. (Put a +1/+1 counter on an Army you control. It's also a Goblin. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Goblin Army creature token first.)
III, IV — Target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

cards.name: Gathering of Darkness
cards.oracleText:
Return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.
Amass Goblins 3. (Put three +1/+1 counters on an Army you control. It's also a Goblin. If you don't control an Army, create a 0/0 black Goblin Army creature token first.)

cards.name: Gnashing of Teeth
cards.oracleText:
Choose one —
• Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
• Creatures target player controls get -1/-1 until end of turn.

cards.name: Gollum, Riddle Master
cards.oracleText:
As Gollum enters, choose odd or even. (Zero is even.)
Whenever an opponent casts a spell with mana value of the chosen quality, choose one that hasn't been chosen —
• Put a +1/+1 counter on Gollum.
• Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life.
• Draw a card.

cards.name: Gollum the Abandoned
cards.oracleText:
Gollum can't block.
When Gollum enters, exile up to one target card from an opponent's graveyard. Each opponent loses 2 life.
{2}, Sacrifice an artifact or creature: Return this card from your graveyard to your hand. Activate only as a sorcery.

cards.name: The Master of Lake-town
cards.oracleText:
Deathtouch
Whenever a player loses life, that player mills that many cards. (Damage causes loss of life.)
When The Master of Lake-town dies, draw a card for each graveyard with seven or more cards in it.

cards.name: Supper for Spiders
cards.oracleText: Put onto the battlefield under your control all creature cards in your opponents' graveyards that were put there from the battlefield this turn. They are Food artifacts with "{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 3 life." (They lose all other types and subtypes.)

cards.name: Burn, Burn, Tree and Fern
cards.oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.)
I — This Saga deals 6 damage to target creature an opponent controls.
II — Destroy target artifact an opponent controls.
III, IV — Add {R}.

cards.name: Desert Were-Worm
cards.oracleText:
This creature gets +2/+0 for each Mountain you control.
Whenever you attack with creatures with total power 12 or greater for the first time each turn, untap all attacking creatures. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

cards.name: Desolation of Smaug
cards.oracleText:
Desolation of Smaug deals 3 damage to each non-Dragon creature.
Add four mana in any combination of colors. Spend this mana only to cast Dragon spells.

cards.name: Gandalf, Goblins' Bane // Flameshape
cards.typeLine: Legendary Creature — Avatar Wizard // Sorcery — Adventure
cards.oracleText: Whenever you cast a noncreature spell, Gandalf gets +1/+1 until end of turn and deals 1 damage to each opponent.

cards.name: Last Light of Durin's Day
cards.oracleText:
Whenever a Mountain you control enters, put a quest counter on this enchantment. If it has six or more quest counters on it, sacrifice it. If you do, search your hand and/or library for a Dragon card and put it onto the battlefield. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

cards.name: The Misty Mountains Cold
cards.oracleText:
(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after IV.)
I, II, III, IV — Create a Treasure token. Then if you control four or more Treasures, sacrifice this Saga. If you do, create a 6/6 red Dragon creature token with flying. (A Treasure token is an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

cards.name: Smaug the Magnificent
cards.oracleText:
Flying, haste
Whenever Smaug attacks, he deals damage equal to the number of Treasures you control to any target.

cards.oracleText:
Trample
When Thorin enters, attach any number of target Equipment you control to target creature you control. When one or more Equipment become attached to that creature this way, that creature deals damage equal to its power to up to one target creature.

cards.name: Beorn the Fierce
cards.oracleText:
Trample
Other Bears you control get +2/+2.
At the beginning of combat on your turn, put a trample counter on up to one target creature you control. It becomes a Bear in addition to its other types. Then if you control three or more Bears, draw two cards.

cards.name: Part in Friendship
cards.oracleText: Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. If its mana value is less than or equal to the number of lands you control, put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. This ability triggers only once each turn.

cards.name: Wood Elves
cards.oracleText: When this creature enters, search your library for a Forest card, put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

If you would draw a card except the first one you draw in each of your draw steps, draw two cards instead.
If one or more tokens would be created under your control, twice that many of those tokens are created instead.

cards.name: Bard the Bowman
cards.oracleText:
Reach
Whenever you draw your second card each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains lifelink until end of turn.

cards.oracleText:

Whenever Bifur enters or attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature.
As long as you have an enduring story, if an ability of a Dwarf you control triggers, that ability triggers an additional time.

futureSets.name: Nauctis: The Sunken Realm
futureSets.notes: Magic's first undersea plane — merfolk, seals, homarids, and gods who command the currents, with two warring kingdoms pushing the realm toward the abyss. Opens the 2027 story arc.

futureSets.name: Universes Beyond (unannounced)
futureSets.notes: WotC confirmed three Universes Beyond sets for 2027, alternating with the Magic Multiverse sets; the IP is still under wraps. Press reporting places the first in April.

futureSets.name: Kamigawa: Titanbreach
futureSets.notes: An Omenpath opens above Towashi and drops a mass of Ikoria onto neon Kamigawa — next-generation mechs versus the behemoths of Ikoria.

futureSets.name: Universes Beyond (unannounced)
futureSets.notes: Second of the three confirmed 2027 Universes Beyond sets; the IP is still under wraps. Press reporting places it in August.

futureSets.name: Zhalfir
futureSets.notes: Zhalfir stands as its own plane for the first time — afrofantasy visual design honoring its storied past, with Teferi Akosa returning home.

futureSets.name: Universes Beyond (unannounced)
futureSets.notes: Third of the three confirmed 2027 Universes Beyond sets; the IP is still under wraps. Press reporting places it in November.
